but yeah the comp is really easy to play, basically the rotation is:
- Always keep at least 1 kath card in hand with flamma
- rouse gets you 1 card, which means you have 2 kath cards in hand
- kath exalt gets you 2 cards, which means you have all 4 kath cards in hand (this is why I dislike Will Unyielding, adding Kath cards causes this to be rng instead of guaranteed)
- Thais dupe last stand, play all cards except hyperflare + 1 remaining card to bounce flamma to, use hyperflare
- you're left with 1 kath card in hand that you can preserve flamma on for next turn
you can do that rotation every single turn, it starts at 300-400k damage or so turn 1 and ramps up to 700k+ damage per turn after several turns
